stemHtml:
Refer to figure.
Which choice provides the most accurate description of the air mass at coordinates W(43°N 024°W)?

options.a: Rear of a warm front, in warm air.
options.b: Ahead of a warm front, in cold air.
options.c: Rear of a warm occlusion, in warm air.
options.d: Ahead of a cold front, in warm air.
